themes: Manager-heavy backlog with long wait times — the overwhelming majority of contacts are Managers, many waiting over 100 days, signaling a systemic gap between product request intake and follow-through that risks eroding trust with day-to-day power users across franchised and multi-location brands.

Repeat accounts and franchised/multi-location brands dominate — accounts like Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Anytime Fitness, and Avenue5 Residential each appear multiple times, suggesting shared or escalating pain points within these organizations that a single conversation or product update could address at scale.

Aging requests span diverse verticals — fitness, hospitality, residential property management, food & beverage, automotive, and home services are all represented, indicating that the underlying product needs (likely around reporting, location management workflows, or publishing efficiency) are broadly felt rather than niche, making resolution high-impact across the customer base.
